THE_ARCHITECT.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.c:
[sine]I came to evaluate this Spire.
And to find the one who vanished within it.[/sine]
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.a: Evaluate? I maintain order here. There is nothing to evaluate.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.c: [jitter]That is for me to decide. Not you.[/jitter]
The watcher returns. Does your order teach nothing but stubbornness?
[sine]It teaches patience. Mine has run dry.[/sine]
Then let us be done with it.
You presume to pass judgment on me?
[jitter]I already have. The verdict is near.[/jitter]
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancient: Well now, you’re a watchful one! Still and quiet, like you’re weighin’ up every speck of junk I got.
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]I weigh all things. It is my purpose. Show me your wares.[/sine]
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancient: Hah! A customer with manners! Take a gander at the pile!
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.ancient: Back again, calm as still water. Grab whatever ya need!
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancient: Found this ol’ journal in the heap. Belonged to another like you. Watchful, quiet sort.
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char: [sine]That belonged to my peer. Where did you find it?[/sine]
DARV.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-2.ancient: Dunno! Stuff just ends up in my pile. Take it, put it to good use!
NEOW.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]I have come only to watch. Nothing more.[/sine]
NEOW.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char:
[sine]To evaluate, not to condemn.
You decided long ago. I have not.[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancie:
A pilgrim, serene and unhurried. How exquisite!
Come closer and receive my blessing.
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]I need no finery. But I will not refuse what the path offers.[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancie: Wise and humble! A rare guest indeed.
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.anci: The tranquil one returns. Don these gifts, traveler.
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancie: Such stillness about you... yet I sense a storm beneath. Which are you, truly?
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char:
I am [sine]calm[/sine], and I am [jitter]wrath[/jitter].
Both, as the moment requires.
NONUPEIPE.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-2.ancie: How thrilling! Then carry my blessing into both.
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancient: So quiet!! So still!! Not grabbing shinies?? Why why?? Strange one!!
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]I take only what I need. I came to watch, not to gather.[/sine]
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancient: Watch watch!! Okay! But take shiny anyway! Take take!
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.ancient: Calm friend back!! Found pretty things! Look look!
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancient: Sometimes you feel angry? Scary angry?? No no!! Be calm always!!
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char: [jitter]Wrath has its place.[/jitter] [sine]So does peace. I hold both.[/sine]
OROBAS.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-2.ancient: Confusing!! But... okay! Stay mostly calm!! Mostly!!
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]A seeker of stillness... we are alike. Rest, take a part of me...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]Your stillness is sleep. Mine is awakening. We are not alike.[/sine]
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Perhaps not... but take this all the same...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.ancient: [thinky_dots]The quiet one returns. Sit, breathe, let the world soften...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]Your peace is so... sharp. Does it never dull...?[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char: [sine]Stillness is not surrender. I quiet my mind to act, not to drift.[/sine]
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancient: JUST A STICK!? A PLAIN STAFF!? WHERE IS THE BLADE!??
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [jitter]My staff is enough. A blade would only slow me.[/jitter]
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancient: A STAFF WIELDER!? UNORTHODOX!! MIGHTY!! I LOVE IT!!
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.ancient: STILL THAT PLAIN STAFF!? TAKE A REAL WEAPON TOO!! JUST IN CASE!!
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char: [sine]I do not fight without cause. You are no enemy.[/sine]
TANX.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-2.ancient: THEN I’LL GIVE YOU A CAUSE!! FIGHT ME!!
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancie: Come closer, dear. My eyes are poor, but I can smell the [jitter][b]fire[/b][/jitter] you keep banked inside.
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]You need not see me. I already hear what hides beneath your kindness.[/sine]
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancie: Oh? The little watcher sees right through me. Let me feed that [jitter][b]flame[/b][/jitter] of yours, dear.
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.anci: Back so soon, sweetie? Sit and [jitter][b]smolder[/b][/jitter] a while. I [jitter][b]insist[/b][/jitter].
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancie: Such embers banked in that quiet heart. Won’t you let them [jitter][b]blaze[/b][/jitter]?
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-1.char: [sine]My [jitter]wrath[/jitter] is mine to kindle. Not yours to feed.[/sine]
TEZCATARA.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-2.ancie: Hah! Such [jitter][b]delicious[/b][/jitter] fuel, left to [jitter][b]starve[/b][/jitter]. A pity, sweetie.
VAKUU.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-0.ancient: A devotee of some forgotten god? I have [sine]better[/sine] gods to offer.
VAKUU.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-1.char: [sine]I serve no god, only my mission. Your contracts are nothing to me.[/sine]
VAKUU.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.0-2.ancient: Then watch [sine]this[/sine]. Sign, and witness true power.
VAKUU.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.1-0r.ancient: Still meditating on my contracts, are we?
VAKUU.talk.WATCHER-WATCHER.2-0.ancient: You evaluate demons and gods alike. Tell me, little monk... who evaluates [sine]you[/sine]?
